summary: Comprehensive testing of QueueIt refactored backend (modular routes) and new admin settings features completed. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified admin login, onboarding tutorial with spotlight/tooltip UI, dashboard with stats/queue/QR generator, settings panel (venue name, change password, replay tutorial), and customer portal song search.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - returns 'QueueIt API' message
GET /api/songs/search?q=love - returns songs array with Spotify results
GET /api/songs/playlists - returns playlists array
POST /api/admin/login with 'hostel2024' - returns success and token
POST /api/admin/login with wrong password - returns 401
GET /api/admin/settings without auth - returns 401
GET /api/admin/settings with auth - returns venue_name and version 1.0.0
PUT /api/admin/settings without auth - returns 401
PUT /api/admin/settings with auth - updates venue name and persists
POST /api/admin/change-password without auth - returns 401
POST /api/admin/change-password with wrong current_password - returns 400
POST /api/admin/change-password with correct password - changes password and returns new token
GET /api/queue - returns queue items array
GET /api/queue/current - returns current playing song or null
POST /api/queue/add - adds song to queue successfully
POST /api/queue/skip without auth - returns 401
POST /api/queue/skip with auth - skips to next song
POST /api/queue/clear without auth - returns 401
POST /api/queue/clear with auth - clears all queue items
GET /api/spotify/token - returns has_token status
GET /api/spotify/auth-url without auth - returns 401
GET /api/spotify/auth-url with auth - returns valid Spotify auth URL
Frontend: Admin login page loads with cyberpunk theme
Frontend: Admin login with 'hostel2024' succeeds
Frontend: Onboarding tutorial appears with spotlight/tooltip steps
Frontend: Onboarding NEXT button advances through steps
Frontend: Onboarding SKIP button exits tutorial
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 3 stat cards (NOW PLAYING, IN QUEUE, TOTAL PROCESSED)
Frontend: Queue section with NEXT and PURGE buttons visible
Frontend: QR Generator section visible
Frontend: Settings section visible with Spotify Connection
Frontend: Venue Name input and Save button visible
Frontend: Change Password section with current/new password inputs visible
Frontend: CHANGE PASSWORD button visible
Frontend: REPLAY TUTORIAL button visible
Frontend: System info shows VERSION 1.0.0 and STATUS OPERATIONAL
Frontend: TERMINATE SESSION (logout) button visible
Frontend: Save venue name via settings works (toast confirmation)
Frontend: Logout returns to login page
Frontend: Customer portal /request loads with QUEUEIT branding
Frontend: Customer portal has SEARCH, BROWSE, QUEUE tabs
Frontend: Song search for 'love' returns results with album art, name, artist, ADD button
seed_data_creation: Test venue name 'TEST_Venue_*' created during settings API test (auto-cleaned by test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored from monolithic server.py into modular routes: admin.py (login, settings, change-password), queue.py (CRUD), songs.py (search, playlists), spotify.py (auth, playback). Password is DB-backed with fallback to env var. Settings API stores venue_name in MongoDB settings collection. Onboarding tutorial uses spotlight positioning to highlight actual UI elements (data-testid targets). All data-testid attributes properly implemented. Spotify is connected in this environment (green status). Customer portal at /request, admin at /admin.
